prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约135名、160名、127名、110名、135名，整体在110–160名区间波动，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约135名，近3年波动幅度约30名；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年6人、2022年7人、2023年7人、2024年10人、2025年10人，呈逐步扩招趋势；2026年计划11人，较2025年再扩招1人（+10%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名连续多年稳居第4名（2021–2026年），属全国顶尖C9联盟高校，办学层次极高；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿数量较多）及学校管理事件；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），短视频曝光量较高；2021年曾出现河南理科投档线华五倒数第一的异常信号，但属个别省份现象，对云南影响有限；拥有28个A-/A/A+学科，其中机械工程、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、生物学、工商管理、管理科学与工程等为A+；电子信息类、人工智能、机械类等招生专业对应学科均为顶尖水平，学科实力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年云南高考报名总人数约37.79万，较2025年（约28.57万）大幅增加约32%，竞争显著加剧；上海交通大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对云南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在全国各省招生分布均衡，无显著本省倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次135名、2026年小幅扩招10%、2026年云南考生总数大幅增加约32%以及学校声誉偏负面等因素：考生大幅增加是推动位次前移（数字减小）的最关键因素，扩招仅部分缓解竞争；声誉偏负面有轻微推后作用但影响有限。预测2026年理科最低位次约138名，区间88–188名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 135, 160, 127, 110, and 135 respectively, fluctuating within the 110–160 range with no clear unilateral trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 135, with a fluctuation range of about 30 in the past 3 years; the enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province for science/physics category: 6 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 10 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 11, an increase of 1 (+10%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 4th consecutively for many years in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2021–2026), belonging to the top-tier C9 League, with an extremely high level of education; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (relatively high number of retractions) and university management incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure; in 2021, there was an abnormal signal of Henan science admission line being the lowest among the Huawu Five, but it was an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Yunnan; has 28 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Biology, Business Administration, and Management Science and Engineering as A+; enrollment majors such as Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, and Mechanical Engineering correspond to top-tier disciplines, with extremely strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Yunnan college entrance examination registrants is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700), leading to intensified competition; Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Yunnan candidates; the university's enrollment distribution across provinces is balanced, with no significant local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 135, the small enrollment expansion of 10% in 2026, the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of Yunnan candidates in 2026, and the somewhat negative reputation of the university: the significant increase in candidates is the most critical factor pushing the ranking forward (numerical decrease), with the expansion only partially alleviating competition; the somewhat negative reputation has a slight pushing-back effect but with limited impact. The predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 138, with a range of 88–188.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 138, with a range of 88–188. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (88) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence); those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 138) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 with some Tier 1 sprinting; those near the upper limit (188) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety net. All majors at Shanghai Jiao Tong University have discipline evaluations of A-class or above, with overall top-tier strength; when applying, it is recommended to balance personal interests with major popularity.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 4th on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the top national universities; although liberal arts are not its main strength, the overall brand effect is extremely strong; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct, etc.), but with only 1 liberal arts enrollment, the impact of reputation fluctuations on such a small-scale enrollment is limited; Douyin popularity is relatively high, attracting considerable attention; law is rated A, foreign language and literature A+, journalism and communication A, Marxist theory A, and other liberal arts-related disciplines are all A-class, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.
